name: io.github.nikitacometa/mnemon-mcp
description: Persistent layered memory for AI agents. SQLite FTS5, fact versioning, zero-cloud.

environmentVariables.name: MNEMON_EMBEDDING_PROVIDER
environmentVariables.description: Embedding provider for vector search: 'openai' or 'ollama' (default: disabled)

environmentVariables.name: MNEMON_EMBEDDING_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for embedding provider (required for OpenAI)
